name: THE GARDEN BUSINESS
subtitle: Garden Design · Landscaping · Maintenance
tagline: Creative garden design, landscaping and maintenance in and around Bath — award-winning workmanship, hassle-free upkeep.
pageTitle: THE GARDEN BUSINESS — Garden Design & Landscaping in Bath
servicesSubtitle: One trusted team for the whole house.

services.name: Emergency Repairs
services.desc: Burst pipes, no heating, leaks — we arrive within the hour. 24/7, 365 days.

services.name: Boiler Installation
services.desc: New boiler supply & fit, annual servicing, landlord gas safety certificates. Gas Safe certified.

services.name: Joinery & Carpentry
services.desc: Bespoke shelving, doors, fitted furniture and small extensions. Measured and made on site.

services.name: Bathroom Fitting
services.desc: Full bathroom renovations — plumbing, tiling, install. Free design visit included.

services.name: Central Heating
services.desc: Radiators, power flushing, smart thermostats and underfloor heating.

services.name: Landlord Services
services.desc: Gas safety (CP12), EICR reports and planned maintenance for rental properties.

aboutParagraphs: The Garden Business creates and maintains fantastic gardens across Bath — from creative design and full landscaping construction to hassle-free ongoing maintenance.
Award-winning workmanship and a friendly, reliable team have earned us a leading reputation with Bath’s homeowners, businesses and prestigious contractors.
No-obligation quotations, clear communication and tidy sites on every project, big or small.

reviews.name: Emma L.
reviews.text: Transformed our rear garden. Designed exactly what we wanted and the build was spotless. Could not be happier.

reviews.name: The Whitakers
reviews.text: Maintenance plan keeps the garden looking perfect with zero effort from us. Reliable and lovely team.

reviews.name: James P.
reviews.text: Oak planters and fencing done beautifully. Fair price, tidy work, finished on time.
